issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering into multiple workflow branches simultaneously, causing HAs and TCs to receive duplicate tasks across post-referral and pre-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Manually review and delete duplicate tasks on any LS leads that received double tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these terminal deal stages. Madelaine updated the workflow filters on March 9 to address this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for Closed Lost or Transferred deals during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage toggled back to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was moved from Offer Accepted back to an earlier stage and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger, causing closing info collection to be missed. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger on March 16.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were toggled back to Offer Accepted and missed TC task generation during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. An HA reported that emails to the agent still showed the old LO (Paul) instead of the new LO (Julie Yocum). Luis investigated and resolved the issue on March 13.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any automated emails to agents for deals that had an LO change during the impact window to ensure the correct LO information is communicated.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment, meaning TCs received no tasks and closing coordination was missed. The issue was reported across multiple MRC deals and HubSpot support was contacted to diagnose it. Madelaine confirmed the issue was fixed on April 1 after speaking with HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.
